summary: Plan-mode PR inventory classification only. No shared canonical was selected because the job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster. Closed PRs are kept closed, open non-security PRs are left non-mutating for maintainer/proof/review follow-up, and the one security-sensitive PR is routed to central security handling.

actions.reason: Already closed after supersession assessment; no mutation available in plan mode.
Independent open PR; keep open for normal maintainer review.
Draft open PR with unique remaining work; no closure or merge action is appropriate.
Already closed; remaining idea may be follow-up work but this closed PR should not be mutated.
Independent open PR with useful but not merge-ready Feishu work; keep open for proof/review follow-up.
Security-sensitive local command execution surface; route to central OpenClaw security handling.
Already closed as fixed elsewhere/current main; no mutation available.
Requires maintainer judgment on intentional default behavior change after author follow-up.
Open ready PR with maintainer-review signal; leave for maintainer decision.

needs_human: #90226: maintainer/product judgment needed on intentionally changing unconfigured thread-scoped sessions to idle/no-expiry reset by default after author follow-up.
#78852: maintainer review needed for otherwise proof-supplied media tool availability performance PR; no merge action allowed in this plan job.
